perfect_idea_zone.definition: Intersection of 'Ideas You Understand' AND 'Ideas The Market Finds Value In'
perfect_idea_zone.test: Can you explain it for 5-20 minutes AND does the market care?

commence.name: Commence Ideation
steps: Look around your immediate environment for ideas
Go to competing YouTube channels, filter by popular, read all titles
Go to other YouTube channels, filter by popular, read all titles
Use YouTube auto-complete search feature
List 10 things that happened to you recently
List what those 10 things taught you
List 10 things you are interested in
List 10 things happening in the world right now
List 10 things you want your viewers to get from your videos
List 5 favourite books
List 3 most important lessons from each book
List 5 favourite movies
List 3 most important lessons from each movie
Find 1 long-form video discussion in your market (1.5hr+)
Find most popular books in your niche, read titles and blurbs
Go for a 60-120 minute walk with phone on airplane mode and notes app open

snatch_twirl.name: Snatch & Twirl
snatch_twirl.description: Find existing video ideas in your niche, grab the idea, add your unique spin
snatch_twirl.principle: Good artists copy, great artists steal
steps: Find viral videos in your niche
Identify the core idea (not the execution)
Add your unique perspective/experience
Package it differently (different hook, format, angle)

audience.name: Audience-Based Ideation
audience.description: Use your audience's questions and problems as content ideas
sources: Video comments (ask viewers to comment problems)

criteria: You can explain it for 5-20 min
Can't explain well enough OR market doesn't care
sub_optimal.action: Either educate yourself on it (if trending) or discard

sub_optimal_conversion: If a trending topic is sub-optimal (you don't know enough), spend hours educating yourself, then create the video. Trend-hopping + deep learning.
